How do you like to learn?

Chances are, there isn?t one answer to this question. It depends,
right? On what you?re learning and why you?re learning it. At
Pluralsight, we?re committed to providing you with choices in how you
train, and that?s why we?re excited to announce we?ve acquired Code
School!

To celebrate this new partnership, we?re making the Pluralsight and
Code School libraries free for everyone for 72 hours! You have until noon
EST on Friday, January 30, 2015 to redeem this offer, and you?ll get 72
hours to train from the start of your access.

If you?re not familiar with Code School, it offers a fun, hands-on way
to gain new skills. Its courses, which incorporate an interactive,
in-browser coding experience, excel at helping you learn by doing. The
next time you want to master something new, consider pairing Pluralsight
courses with a Code School tutorial to practice core concepts of the
technology.

I?m thrilled to welcome Code School into the Pluralsight family. More
ways to diversify and enhance your skill-set mean more opportunities for
learning breakthroughs?and that?s exactly what Pluralsight is all
about.

Aaron Skonnard

Subject: Welcome to the K9 Community!
Body: Welcome to the K9 Community!

Thank you for choosing K9 Web Protection! At Blue Coat, we believe that homes connected to the internet should be safe.  Whether you are protecting children from adult content, assisting yourself in avoiding threats and temptations, or keeping your computer clean from spyware and malware, we hope that K9 will serve you well.  For these reasons, we make K9 Web Protection free to all home users.

We also need concerned and involved people like you to help us spread the word about these issues and the tools available to help others. Below are some suggestions on effective community actions.

1.  INSTALL K9 WEB PROTECTION

Do the following to install K9 Web Protection:

  a) Download K9 Web Protection from http://www1.k9webprotection.com/getk9/download-software .
  b) During the installation, you will be asked for your license.  Your K9 Web Protection license is: 

K9CE39A25B

  c) You will also be asked for an administrator password.  Please choose one that you will not forget.  K9 Web Protection is a security product, and by design, it's hard to get around, so please REMEMBER YOUR PASSWORD!  You will need this password to adjust K9's settings or to uninstall the product.
  d) Certain firewall settings can hamper or disable functionality of K9 Web Protection.  Make sure to instruct your firewall to always allow k9filter.exe access to the Internet.

2.  PROTECT YOUR iPhone(R), iPod touch(R), iPad(TM) OR Android(TM) device

The K9 Web Protection Browser is a safe web browser available from the App Store(SM) or Google Play. Just search for "K9".

Just like K9 Web Protection for your desktop, the app is also free!

3. SPREAD THE WORD

  a) Tell your friends about K9 by sending them an email, posting on your blog, or posting on your favorite social media site (facebook, twitter, etc.)
  b) Become a fan of K9 Web Protection on Facebook at http://www.facebook.com/K9WebProtection .
  c) Spread the word to organizations you are associated with, such as schools, churches or community groups.  You can find flyers, signs, and other information to download and print on the K9 website under the "Spread the Word" section at http://www1.k9webprotection.com/resources/spread-the-word .
  d) Ask your ISP, computer maker, or companies like Google and Microsoft to include filtering software, such as K9 Web Protection, with their services.
  e) Add links to http://www.k9webprotection.com on your website. If you'd like to use our logo, please visit our logo page at http://www1.k9webprotection.com/tools/logos .

Pick some of these actions, and try them out. We really do need the help, and we know from experience that you can have an impact.

SUPPORT OPTIONS

If you have questions about installing or using the product, please go to http://www1.k9webprotection.com/support/overview or simply click the [Help] link in the K9 administration interface.  If you have non-support-related questions or comments, visit us at http://www1.k9webprotection.com/support/feedback .

Best Regards,

Your K9 Web Protection Product and Support Team

Subject: Zimbra: Week 2 of Your 60-Day Trial
Body: Zimbra_Nurture_Checklist2.jpg (http://www.zimbra.com/?utm_campaign=zimbra-free-trial&utm_source=hs_automation&utm_medium=email&utm_content=10868709&_hsenc=p2ANqtz-8fJBBdnI_IyqW5VqCAqWnjDtGuu8M9_zXVe4bxFs5QQLXYZlZRUWkDkyMsEubBtykajFrsvGlza-u5sVVZxZxfVUr32g&_hsmi=10868709)      

Greetings Cosmas,

We hope you are enjoying your 60-day trial of Zimbra, and were able to complete the Week 1 (http://info.zimbra.com/os-checklist-pt1.html?utm_campaign=zimbra-free-trial&utm_source=hs_automation&utm_medium=email&utm_content=10868709&_hsenc=p2ANqtz-_Znv1S6CWZ0X_8RUt5lKptpkPiOnajRT89uXPdgBVJgMrkyib5SaS30QN2NnVgK8xydeE_ghm5IdIIRyh5utVZyv0WLQ&_hsmi=10868709) Evaluation Checklist we sent last week to install and configure your Zimbra trial. If you ran into any issues, or have any questions, feel free to email: sales@zimbra.com

This week, it?s time to focus on basic administration and end-user feature/functionality testing. Here is the checklist of action items to maximize Week 2 (http://info.zimbra.com/ft-checklist-week2.html?utm_campaign=zimbra-free-trial&utm_source=hs_automation&utm_medium=email&utm_content=10868709&_hsenc=p2ANqtz-9SJDi_Ie4DtPoue0e9zJMD6IXc-aYAMsvJGXilIt81K078uYI8nYZNotJUyG3a0coGNVg9ktG6H2XCVhyGxZHZeCqUSQ&_hsmi=10868709&utm_campaign=zimbra-free-trial&utm_source=hs_automation&utm_medium=email&utm_content=10868709&_hsenc=p2ANqtz-9X4whnVAdOAkeFY8lOSfKoIgFN1iXuKyb9JmCqFjdt17kz1t8I4WR5No4cKw4psAopGYXVPj637RvIpcCRf6AZGUCNpw&_hsmi=10868709) of your evaluation:

Week 2 Evaluation Checklist:

Basic Administration

- Create Test Accounts: (http://wiki.zimbra.com/wiki/Bulk_Provisioning?utm_campaign=zimbra-free-trial&utm_source=hs_automation&utm_medium=email&utm_content=10868709&_hsenc=p2ANqtz-8PfvZpRaFW3gEMwER9dLBhrXlx_2frSKMptd86wBWvXRp_gR2jeMlTphWAN_SlHgyJ_bHYAwtBrDZabB55rLvZYsCvPA&_hsmi=10868709)  Configure one account at a time with the New Account Wizard, or create multiple accounts at once using the Account Migration Wizard.

- Define Classes of Service (http://www.zimbra.com/docs/ne/8.0.0/administration_guide/wwhelp/wwhimpl/js/html/wwhelp.htm?utm_campaign=zimbra-free-trial&utm_source=hs_automation&utm_medium=email&utm_content=10868709&_hsenc=p2ANqtz--pFQYJ9kiSyMXnOadxSAzS0Kr460TzuY_zj-UhYweGYIPlniMEXtwyK5fMNd_GpSKRj7l-_PBTHxIMCvzCZIQmaShlrw&_hsmi=10868709#href=NE_admin_guide_8.Class_of_Services_for_Accounts.html) : A default Class of Service (COS) is automatically created during the installation of Zimbra software. It controls mailbox quotas, message lifetime, password restrictions, attachment-blocking and server pools.

- Add Zimlets (http://wiki.zimbra.com/wiki/Zimlets,_Setting_Up?utm_campaign=zimbra-free-trial&utm_source=hs_automation&utm_medium=email&utm_content=10868709&_hsenc=p2ANqtz--9GLIp-WRJttrA65QCKA99b757lsNwraLal4VI9EPFTB2oy_Yv15B5Z6pc_4j11zZPyIH9BTxROpt_HGARPxxrqPKTtw&_hsmi=10868709) : Zimlets enable your end users to look at information and interact with third-party applications (calendar, maps, Salesforce.com, WebEx and more) from within their email messages. Zimlets can be made available by modifying the Class of Service (COS).

- Mail Queue Monitoring (http://wiki.zimbra.com/wiki/Mail_Queue_Monitoring?utm_campaign=zimbra-free-trial&utm_source=hs_automation&utm_medium=email&utm_content=10868709&_hsenc=p2ANqtz-91JAgFaQjCa3qNx9ubsOL_4BAl7xUH9UjKAK8NwrpmZx-m0djNFq1636k8INh_X-KpH8fFlDNiPk1gjAHqbW3hIMJs-Q&_hsmi=10868709) : Incoming and outgoing mail is processed by postfix in a series of queues that can be monitored from within the admin console; select Manage Mail Queues from the left sidebar and your queue information will be shown.

- Certificates (http://wiki.zimbra.com/wiki/Administration_Console_and_CLI_Certificate_Tools?utm_campaign=zimbra-free-trial&utm_source=hs_automation&utm_medium=email&utm_content=10868709&_hsenc=p2ANqtz-8_WtSCiGNT9CuhCyoY3S0IvjvKCk084RLHDyPL4ReSndiwCZIp5K0BcpFh0zun3O9dUsh-tUvFwi77OTz8YW_qe0rdzQ&_hsmi=10868709#ZCS_Administration_Console_Certificates_Tools) : Clicking Install Certificate from either the Manage Certificates tab or a Certificates tab opens the Certificate Installation Wizard. The Certificate Installation Wizard is a tool that will help you quickly create and deploy a certificate.

- High Availability (HA) (http://wiki.zimbra.com/wiki/Performance_Recommendations_for_Virtualizing_Zimbra_with_VMware_vSphere?utm_campaign=zimbra-free-trial&utm_source=hs_automation&utm_medium=email&utm_content=10868709&_hsenc=p2ANqtz--DYoK_k077FJARItoE6sEZSw3Fwg_xakWe_074WyRvfKfAJrNl8CZ9etdNhz3QAHEUCTYw_Y4QpWjyDv-PAVhiJ_DQfA&_hsmi=10868709) : Availability of resources in a computer system in the wake of component failures in the system.

- Disaster Recovery: (http://www.zimbra.com/docs/ne/8.0.0/administration_guide/wwhelp/wwhimpl/js/html/wwhelp.htm?utm_campaign=zimbra-free-trial&utm_source=hs_automation&utm_medium=email&utm_content=10868709&_hsenc=p2ANqtz--CENR-9oLdQtw2TZPAbk9Hk8Ne0E8gTQVQJ0DuLvO98siijQEr9qEginLvj_ab1MNpKeINjkA5JbsSwYu4yCUC5HSqIA&_hsmi=10868709#href=NE_admin_guide_8.General_Steps_for_Disaster_Recovery.html)  Steps to take to replace a failed server

- Unified Communications (UC) Integrations (http://www.zimbra.com/docs/ne/8.0.0/administration_guide/wwhelp/wwhimpl/js/html/wwhelp.htm?utm_campaign=zimbra-free-trial&utm_source=hs_automation&utm_medium=email&utm_content=10868709&_hsenc=p2ANqtz--yP-P5nvfaB658nAsewAu2yFvBsclNUSbvNB2iA9BfNhZFD0jNCDHK47t1XI7XWhyGfZ7hxk4t0VVQera6F4jI0x6L8A&_hsmi=10868709#href=NE_admin_guide_8.Using_the_Voice_Service.html) : Click-to-call, voicemail, presence and chat.

End-User Feature/Functionality Testing

- Test the basic end-user functions of creating, sending and replying to email (http://www.zimbra.com/how_to/?utm_campaign=zimbra-free-trial&utm_source=hs_automation&utm_medium=email&utm_content=10868709&_hsenc=p2ANqtz--eQb1aQeSXh49tNNjHYwdluZC65ggml3vrG4uCnoy3UBGh7u7qA9CT93WLRXl8ufDyKEQnD72CPP_2G6N8qofgPy42vg&_hsmi=10868709) ; using folders; (http://www.zimbra.com/how_to/managing_your_account_using_folders.html?utm_campaign=zimbra-free-trial&utm_source=hs_automation&utm_medium=email&utm_content=10868709&_hsenc=p2ANqtz-_R6_VuH7I3OCfZyJ7qXGt_BymqtEp49yPGC2cvOI03zGDTABdU11V8v3BQxMyiB52Kr1hOTRpes3B2bmEfieW6zt33tA&_hsmi=10868709)  searching (text/Boolean) (http://www.zimbra.com/how_to/searching_for_items.html?utm_campaign=zimbra-free-trial&utm_source=hs_automation&utm_medium=email&utm_content=10868709&_hsenc=p2ANqtz-_bop-74EZ9YslB4RQqDpc60JorTa69Pb2BkH4NPYPAC717w9HP1Y9t2YFlU09GGx1Q82v8LSMmSRLyRE4gECZCc3nSag&_hsmi=10868709)  and creating filters (http://www.zimbra.com/desktop/help/en_US/filters/how_filtering_works.htm?utm_campaign=zimbra-free-trial&utm_source=hs_automation&utm_medium=email&utm_content=10868709&_hsenc=p2ANqtz--RBRpbdzQAcrGq6KPsYZq3AZcQ3GuOgf47Ln1ENF_Du-RrmIBQzzgRIV1Gr4JMOb1-MAm0i2XIk_z05WyPxiaKVNRVmg&_hsmi=10868709) .

- Address Book (http://wiki.zimbra.com/wiki/Import_and_Export_of_Contacts?utm_campaign=zimbra-free-trial&utm_source=hs_automation&utm_medium=email&utm_content=10868709&_hsenc=p2ANqtz-_Ts6FMKQNDxFgjPKZUTvzVh3AK3_i4s1mf0zv7lbPq2xRSka2EIFZxwHFOY6Cku96z2dOLGiggjBtxaHo9c5B18d6hyA&_hsmi=10868709) : Importing/exporting contact

- Calendar (http://www.zimbra.com/how_to/calendar_using_the_calendar.html?utm_campaign=zimbra-free-trial&utm_source=hs_automation&utm_medium=email&utm_content=10868709&_hsenc=p2ANqtz-92Z2qhb3D_NwLBUV6eV5bkEs-h0avTB3zvs_v3K0GapL0e5pVA7qRSueIem-63uQzPC7Dm67c-jAZkteEsF-zFccjKcw&_hsmi=10868709) : Free/busy reporting, sharing and delegation (http://www.zimbra.com/how_to/sharing_your_items.html?utm_campaign=zimbra-free-trial&utm_source=hs_automation&utm_medium=email&utm_content=10868709&_hsenc=p2ANqtz-92cES_AfJ6O9TBD0hckFqLCAj74ZdzXwJHAdgu0pBfOR2WvebOevvkOzBFw95G80Fc5FvClftIO_sPKO4XL01SJjwK0A&_hsmi=10868709) 

- Setting email preferences (http://www.zimbra.com/how_to/set_email_preferences.html?utm_campaign=zimbra-free-trial&utm_source=hs_automation&utm_medium=email&utm_content=10868709&_hsenc=p2ANqtz-8-t09lVvxYM73kPWEmccg30QE8UHYErqTpcIF34XKxNRBJ9x_ECjzXA5kdtFmRAniG7i2kjTeO4ZKsHUjEd56ueAkdnA&_hsmi=10868709) : Customizing signature files, text versus html

- Unified Communications (UC) Integration functionality (https://www.zimbra.com/products/unified-communications.html?utm_campaign=zimbra-free-trial&utm_source=hs_automation&utm_medium=email&utm_content=10868709&_hsenc=p2ANqtz-_00pCnq7HjeEMWtDPw1xmh18zcj5NY8t-8dIpxT5XFKOuHjZBQUZOXFXMWTc494UQKp_GkfUL3wVeGAw2KDlcd_QMgZA&_hsmi=10868709) : Click-to-call, voicemail, presence and chat

Did you know:

- Zimbra Collaboration is used by several thousand customers, and over 100 million end users, in more than 140 countries ?

Here is an example below of what a phishing scam in an email message might look like.

Dear E-mail Client,

ÿ

function normal again.

*Threats.* Have you ever received a threat that your account would be closed if you didn't
respond to an email message? The email message shown above is an example of the same
trick. Cybercriminals often use threats that your security has been compromised.

*Beware of links in email.* If you see a link in a suspicious email message, don't click
on it. Links might also lead you to .exe files. These kinds of file are known to spread
malicious software.

Phishing email messages & websites, are designed to steal personal information of your
computer.

Here is an example below of what a phishing scam in an email message might look like.

Dear E-mail Client,

ÿ

You have exhaustedÿthe 5GB Bandwidth space of your email account and for this reason some
of your incoming mails with files and documents above 50KB have been filtered and placed
pending. Sincerely, Mail Service Team.

Yourÿ e-mail account'sÿ Bandwidth has been upgraded to 10GB to enable us serve you better.
Kindly Click on the below link to complete the upgrade on your account in order to receive
your pending mails and enjoy better quality and efficient service delivery.ÿ

ÿ

Follow this link to complete the process:ÿ*[CLICK HERE](http://tinyurl.com/lrszggc)*

ÿ

Once the information provided matches the records on our database, your account will
function normal again.

Sincerely,

Mail Service Team.

*Threats.* Have you ever received a threat that your account would be closed if you didn't
respond to an email message? The email message shown above is an example of the same
trick. Cybercriminals often use threats that your security has been compromised.

*Beware of links in email.* If you see a link in a suspicious email message, don't click
on it. Links might also lead you to .exe files. These kinds of file are known to spread
malicious software.

ÿ

*Report phishing scams*

úÿÿÿÿÿÿÿÿ If you receive any such mails report immediately to the IT dept.

úÿÿÿÿÿÿÿÿ *Never respond to emails that request personal information.***

úÿÿÿÿÿÿÿÿ Right-click the suspicious message, point to *Junk*, and then click *Report
Junk*.

ÿ

Thank You for your Attention

Stay Alert.

Subject: Welcome to the K9 Community!
Body: Welcome to the K9 Community!

Thank you for choosing K9 Web Protection! At Blue Coat, we believe that homes connected to the internet should be safe.  Whether you are protecting children from adult content, assisting yourself in avoiding threats and temptations, or keeping your computer clean from spyware and malware, we hope that K9 will serve you well.  For these reasons, we make K9 Web Protection free to all home users.

We also need concerned and involved people like you to help us spread the word about these issues and the tools available to help others. Below are some suggestions on effective community actions.

1.  INSTALL K9 WEB PROTECTION

Do the following to install K9 Web Protection:

  a) Download K9 Web Protection from http://www1.k9webprotection.com/getk9/download-software .
  b) During the installation, you will be asked for your license.  Your K9 Web Protection license is: 

K9BZ3E44DB

  c) You will also be asked for an administrator password.  Please choose one that you will not forget.  K9 Web Protection is a security product, and by design, it's hard to get around, so please REMEMBER YOUR PASSWORD!  You will need this password to adjust K9's settings or to uninstall the product.
  d) Certain firewall settings can hamper or disable functionality of K9 Web Protection.  Make sure to instruct your firewall to always allow k9filter.exe access to the Internet.

2.  PROTECT YOUR iPhone(R), iPod touch(R), iPad(TM) OR Android(TM) device

The K9 Web Protection Browser is a safe web browser available from the App Store(SM) or Google Play. Just search for "K9".

Just like K9 Web Protection for your desktop, the app is also free!

3. SPREAD THE WORD

  a) Tell your friends about K9 by sending them an email, posting on your blog, or posting on your favorite social media site (facebook, twitter, etc.)
  b) Become a fan of K9 Web Protection on Facebook at http://www.facebook.com/K9WebProtection .
  c) Spread the word to organizations you are associated with, such as schools, churches or community groups.  You can find flyers, signs, and other information to download and print on the K9 website under the "Spread the Word" section at http://www1.k9webprotection.com/resources/spread-the-word .
  d) Ask your ISP, computer maker, or companies like Google and Microsoft to include filtering software, such as K9 Web Protection, with their services.
  e) Add links to http://www.k9webprotection.com on your website. If you'd like to use our logo, please visit our logo page at http://www1.k9webprotection.com/tools/logos .

Pick some of these actions, and try them out. We really do need the help, and we know from experience that you can have an impact.

SUPPORT OPTIONS

If you have questions about installing or using the product, please go to http://www1.k9webprotection.com/support/overview or simply click the [Help] link in the K9 administration interface.  If you have non-support-related questions or comments, visit us at http://www1.k9webprotection.com/support/feedback .

Best Regards,

Your K9 Web Protection Product and Support Team

Subject: Dana Group Enquiry


Dear Mr. Ogbobe,



Thank you for your interest in MainOne's services.

We will be delighted to offer Dana Group the opportunity to subscribe and connect to MainOne?s world-class, affordable, reliable Internet broadband services which can be customized for a variety of solutions.


As discussed, MainOne is licensed as an international carrier of broadband capacity. We are currently positioned to offer bandwidth solutions between our point of presence in Nigeria, Ghana and London.  Our wide range of services listed below can be customized for a variety of solutions. Please attached are our corporate brochures for a detailed comprehension of our services.

?         Global Internet Access (GIA): This package offers direct access and a shorter route to the internet for clients do not have an Autonomous System Number (ASN). It is designed to meet the needs of Enterprise and Corporate organizations. The benefits of  GIA include IPv4 & IPv6 enabled and Monitoring and protection against Denial Of Service (DoS) attack

?         Global Internet Transit (GIT): This package offers direct access and a shorter route to the internet from West Africa. It is targeted at ISPs and service providers who have an Autonomous System Number (ASN) i.e. unique identification number of the network on the internet. The benefits of GIT include low latency and effective peering with content providers for internet traffic.

?         Metro Leased Circuit: This is a carrier grade cost effective solution which interconnects multiple LANs. It has expanded capabilities of Metro Etherlink Private Line (Point to Point), Metro Etherlink Virtual Private Line (Point to Multipoint) and Metro Etherlan Service (Multipoint to Multipoint).

?         International Private Leased Circuit (IPLC): IPLC provides customers with a dedicated and clear channel circuit to any destination worldwide. IPLC contracts are offered on a 1, 3 and 5 year contract.

?         Indefeasible Right of Use (IRU): The customer has exclusive ownership rights on the submarine cable for 15 years. The product is best suited to customers who have a long term need for capacity as it offers the best pricing based on tenor and volume.



?         Data Center services: MainOne?s state of the art data centers provide collocation, cloud and disaster recovery services to assist customers optimize the capital and operational costs of maintaining their dedicated IT infrastructure.

?         Global Video Connect (GVC): GVC is a Content Delivery Network (CDN) service that facilitates the transfer of video content from production companies and distributors (content owners) to broadcasters all over the world.

?         Global Etherlink: MainOne provides customers who wish to create a virtual private network (VPN) with a secure Layer 2 point to point connection between any two or more locations in Nigeria or Ghana and the rest of the world.

MainOne would like an opportunity to learn more about your business and current bandwidth requirements and see how we can tailor our services to effectively address your business needs.



Our Accounts Manager, George Opara will be willing to engage you for further discussions. His contact details below.

Subject: New Virtual Technology Summit webcast coming up. Register now!
Body: ========================================================
Hands-on Labs & Learning with Oracle & Community Experts
========================================================

Oracle Technology Network invites you to register for the Virtual Technology Summit happening on July 15, 2015. 

Join Oracle ACEs, Java Champions and Oracle Product Experts, as they share their insights and expertise through Hands-on-Labs, highly technical presentations and demos that enable you to master the skills you need to meet todays IT challenges.

View the full agenda, abstracts and HOL participation instructions. 
<http://app.response.oracle-mail.com/e/er?elq_mid=19811&sh=&cmid=EMEAFM15048311MPP002C011&s=1973398186&lid=84826&elq=0e54708412ec4e7395a396e985367067&elqaid=19811&elqat=1&elqTrackId=aac12feb87744df59c1c6e4f0e4fe6b0>

This interactive, online event offers four technical tracks, each with a unique focus:         
*  Java - It's All About Innovation: In its 20th year, Java is used by over 9 million developers world-wide in every major industry. Learn all about Java innovation and discover how to program a parallel application with Java 8 lambdas, build a robot with 3D printed parts and use Docker, a best-in-class platform to test and manage releases. 

*  Database - Mastering Oracle Database Technologies: Oracle Database 12c delivers market-leading security, high performance, availability and scalability for cloud application deployments. This event offers two Database tracks; one focused on cloud application development and deployment practices and the other on developing and deploying .Net applications on the Oracle platform. Sessions focus on Oracle Database Cloud Services, Oracle .Net development tools and technologies and more. 

*  Middleware - Oracle WebLogic ?The #1 Application Server Across Conventional and Cloud environments: Oracle Fusion Middleware experts present how-to technical sessions on WebLogics role in today's middleware architectures. The sessions will focus on security and authentication, service monitoring and exploration, and on WebLogic 12c Server's new APIs and tools for application development.

*  Operating Systems, Virtualization Technologies, and Hardware - Systems Security: Oracle Systems software is engineered for deployment in the most demanding IT environment. From Oracle Solaris, to Open Stack to Oracle Linux, Oracle has engineered their systems platforms with security as an essential element. Learn from Oracle security experts about the default security features and layers of defense built into Oracle Systems and defense-in-depth best practices.

Subject: RE: VPN Roll-out
Body: Thanks for all the info.

For cloud backup I had already put something together for Dana Group and hence will dig out those emails for you. Basically a web based system that used a small client application to perform the backups. However, it also incorporated a secure dropbox like file system such that you could pull a single file out of the backup. Also was cross platform so would also backup Mac's and Mobile's.

As far as I know AD has not been implemented in a lock down way. Due to the fact that we were rolling AD out as quickly as possibly the initial idea was to get all users into an AD and have the VPN up and running. The next step is to lock down AD, however, I feel that you may need to re-create the AD domains. This is mostly due to the fact that the Forest Level PDC was in a VM and I believe that VM no longer boots.

Anyway, now that 11 sites are on the VPN I think it is important for them to be monitored properly and hence I wanted to re-visit your internal monitoring. We have recently switched our monitoring from ZenOSS due to the computer specifications in the latest version (along with the added complexity of the system). We are now using Zabbix which is simpler to install and allows for seamless monitoring of a variety of systems. Zabbix also does run well in a fairly small VM and I am testing it in a small 1Gb RAM VM at the moment.

As Girish will be back on Monday I will catch up with him during the week.

Suneel.


From: Cosmas Akanna Ogbobe [mailto:COgbobe@danagroup.com]
Sent: 16 May 2015 13:39
To: Suneel Jhangiani
Subject: RE: VPN Roll-out

Hello Suneel,

Thanks for checking in. It's been long really. So sorry I have not checked in for a while. Grish's leave date ends 17th being tomorrow. 11 sites are currently on VPN. Users in the locations rolled out to AD also.
DMD requested for auto backup for all the users in the locations instead of monthly manual backup we do. Been working on a  cloud base backup for users. Had no breakthrough whatsoever. Recently while Girish was on leave, on the sly, I went through the AD. Realized users data profile roaming is very much possible. Set up a separate AD on the VM on my PC, added some PCs to my AD. Got all data roamed. Saved on the user's PC as well as the AD.

Issues on the VM resolved but I have got no user logon access.
Sent a training support request to the management. Yet to get response. Aside the CCNA training I had before coming here, I have not been able to do any other one due to the financial demand aspect of it. I see there is need for constant update tech-wise if we are to follow the trend of technology.

Best regards,

Body: 2-Step Verification turned onHi Cosmas,Congratulations on enabling 2-Step
Verification for your Google Account cogbobe@danagroup.com! We have a few
suggestions to make sure you can always access your account.

*What if an app stops working*
Now that you have 2-Step Verification, you may have trouble accessing your
account from some apps, such as:

    - "Mail" on iPhone, iPad, or Mac;
    - Chat clients (e.g., Adium).

To get your apps working again, you'll need something called an app
password. Don't worry - we'll generate one for you, and you won't need to
remember it. Get started now
<https://accounts.google.com/IssuedAuthSubTokens?hide_authsub=1&rfr=eem>.

*Set up a backup phone*
If your primary phone is ever unavailable when you need a code, Google can
send one to a backup, like your home or work phone or even a family
member's phone. To set one up,

    1. Go to your 2-Step Verification settings
    <https://accounts.google.com/SmsAuthConfig?rfr=eem> page.
    2. Click on *Add a phone number* in the *Backup phones* section.


*Get backup codes*
If you don't have access to your primary or backup phones - such as when
you're traveling - you can sign in with a backup code. You can keep them in
your wallet or save them as a file on your computer. To get your backup
codes,

    1. Go to your 2-Step Verification settings
    <https://accounts.google.com/SmsAuthConfig?rfr=eem> page.
    2. Click on *Show/Generate codes*.


Learn more <https://www.google.com/landing/2step/?rfr=eem> about 2-Step
Verification and update <https://accounts.google.com/SmsAuthConfig?rfr=eem>

Subject: BACK UP & CONNECTIVITY SOLUTION TO DANA GROUP
Body: Dear Girish,

It was indeed our pleasure of meeting with your team and the opportunity to discuss other service(s) offerings i.e. connectivity solution to your esteemed group.

Please find attached Back up Proposal, Colocation form and more information on benefits of MainOne data centre Solution offering as requested.

The conglomerate Industry has experienced a surge in demand for information technology solutions to drive business processes. The new era of Dana Group's operations will be marked by highly agile networked branches, subsidiaries and suppliers that use information analytics as they deploy and deliver products/services.

The need to effectively store, manage and access information on demand in order to create a differencing factor will be dependent on a reliable and proven enterprise Data Center facility backed by a highly reliable communication network. Consistent with global best practices where major businesses host their data offsite in certified data centers interconnected with reliable high speed communications networks, Main One has launched into the data center business by building a one-of-a-kind, Tier 3+ data center in Lagos and another within a 50-kilometer radius of Lagos.

Our 600-rack data center, touted as the largest in West Africa, designed to meet TIA 942 standards, will offer a highly secured and reliable purpose built facility. We also understand your Organisation's requirement for a highly secured environment. Our data centre is designed to meet these requirements and features in place to buttress this include, Perimeter and internal facility fitted with motion sensitive surveillance, 24 x 7 armed security guards, and biometric access controls. We can also provide for additional comfort and security a caged environment area as well as a dedicated suite for your collocated equipment.

Our proven track record of excellence in operating a Data center facility hosting primary and secondary data infrastructure for customers in the Financial Industry, Oil and Gas, Telecommunication government testifies to our reliability.  This makes our services attractive to Dana business needs and will enable you easily accomplish the following:

*             Reduce the current costs of building and maintaining your own data center;
*             Ensure the highest standards of availability of service based on Main One's proven no-compromise design and operations;
*             Provide a faster consolidated view of organization-wide information to support decision- making processes;
*             Benefit from the ongoing operational expertise of highly-trained Professionals, allowing you to focus on your core business; and
*             Access your network via Main One's highly reliable metro fiber network and global Internet reach.

We believe that incorporating outsourced data center services into your operational model for the future will be important to assure reduced cost, enhanced access to strategic IT services, and continued overall competitiveness of your organization.

We look forward to your feedback.

Warm Regard

George Opara
Sales Manager, Enterprise

Subject: CYBEROAM TRAINING
Body: 




[Description: http://www.elitecore.com/mailers/Invitation%20Mailer/images/cyberoam_logo.jpg]<http://www.cyberoam.com/>

INVITATION



[Description: http://www.elitecore.com/mailers/Invitation%20Mailer/images/banner.jpg]





Dear Customer,


Ha-Shem invites you for CCNSP (Cyberoam Certified Network & Security Professional) for its customers in Nigeria. The certification is a 3-day instructor- led training course that provides a comprehensive foundation and troubleshooting knowledge which prepare for you the day-to-day management of Cyberoam UTM Appliances.


Through extensive hands-on labs, participants work through a real-world configuration example that employs the most common features applicable to enterprises of all sizes.  Participants also a solid knowledge and understanding of how to install & configure Cyberoam UTM appliance into their existing environment, and the operational maintenance involved to ensure optimal performance and protection of their corporate assets.



Course Objectives





Use the GUI or CLI to complete administration and maintenance tasks for Cyberoam appliances including: system settings and network configuration, creation of administrative accounts, system back-ups, the monitoring of system alerts, device performance, operation status and firmware management to ensure availability and reliability




Implement logging and monitoring features of the Cyberoam Appliance for intrusion detection and reporting purposes




Configure firewall policies with WAN link connection , scheduling, source and service type restrictions, and log unauthorized traffic




Understand the differences between NAT/Route and Proxy ARP (transparent) deployment modes of the Cyberoam UTM Appliance





You are invited to attend a training program for CCNSP.


Please make a note of the program details:


Date:20th-22nd October, 2014
Time: 08:30 AM till 05:30 PM



Venue:
HA-Shem Network Services Ltd

(Ha-Shem Academy)

9, Ibikunle Street, Off University Road

Herbert Macaulay Way, Yaba, Lagos


Contact: Temitope Aransiola
Number :  + 234 7046367151
Email : training@ha-shem.com<mailto:training@ha-shem.com>


Seats are limited. To make a reservation Click Here<mailto:training@ha-shem.com?subject=Seat%20Reservation>


Best Regards,

Team Ha-Shem

Trainers Introduction, Delegate Introduction

Module 1: Basics of Networking & Security

Module 2:Cyberoam Identity Based UTM

Module 3:Cyberoam Products

Module 4:Cyberoam Deployment

Module 5:Firewall

Module 6:User Authentication

Module 7:Content Filter

Module 8:Gateway Anti-Virus / Anti-Spam

Module 9:Intrusion Detection & Prevention (IDP)

Module 10:Virtual Private Network (VPN)

Module 11:Multilink Manager

Module 12:Routing

Module 13:General Administration

Certification Exam

TCP/IP Protocol Suite


Network Security Fundamentals

Subject: Special promotion: 50% discount training fee
Body: 
Special promotion: 50% discount training fee for Configuring and Troubleshooting a Windows Server? 2008 Network Infrastructure

The purpose of this 5-day course is to teach the WIS TS how to implement and configure secure network access as well as how to implement fault tolerant storage technologies with FSRM2 and DFS.

Course Duration: 5 Days

About This Course
This five-day instructor-led course provides students with the knowledge and skills to configure and troubleshoot a Windows Sever 2008 network infrastructure. Students will learn to implement and configure secure network access and implement fault tolerant storage technologies. Students will gain an understanding of the network technologies most commonly used with Windows Server 2008 and IP-enabled networks. Students will also learn how to secure servers and maintain update compliance.

Audience Profile
The primary audience for this course includes Active Directory technology specialists aspiring to be Enterprise Administrators (Tier 4 day-to-day network operations) or Network Administrators (Tier 2). Experienced Server Administrators aspiring to be Enterprise Administrators would also benefit from this course.

The secondary audience for this course includes Storage Area Network Administrators who need to understand this information to deploy or extend their current storage infrastructure. Operations Managers who need this information to support troubleshooting efforts and business decisions would also benefit from this course.

At Course Completion
After completing this course, students will be able to:
ú         Install and configure servers.
ú         Configure and troubleshoot DNS.

ú         Configure and troubleshoot DHCP.

Open Source: Are You Considering It?

One of the main drivers of open source software is transparency, and security is one of the chief benefits that emerges from open and transparent development. According to Freddie Dawson of Forbes, ?a growing interest in security ? particularly in the EMEA region ? has set some companies to looking at open-source solutions to maintain security and data privacy in areas such as email, ?cloud? services and file transfer.?

Head over to Forbes.com (http://www.forbes.com/sites/freddiedawson/2015/02/27/why-every-company-should-be-thinking-open-source-and-why-many-still-arent/?utm_campaign=newsletter&utm_source=hs_email&utm_medium=email&utm_content=16398204&_hsenc=p2ANqtz-8WkCAsj9DSHb4qfdHCOcmelOkXGTbiawO9gZFX7tlchOMfX3vrVpwWrwgKUs--wzfCAfwhJsL3iGvk1NFvHmrQabu65A&_hsmi=16398204) to read more about Why Every Company Should be Thinking Open Source, But Many Still Aren?t (http://www.forbes.com/sites/freddiedawson/2015/02/27/why-every-company-should-be-thinking-open-source-and-why-many-still-arent/?utm_campaign=newsletter&utm_source=hs_email&utm_medium=email&utm_content=16398204&_hsenc=p2ANqtz-8ezyEXInWn3WsyhN6fo25oEYgRtDCY0cn0uURjSEy5PUp4c81Y6KGe0jo2QBIpREXzBT2sb22tfiS1RVicME-t3z-Y4A&_hsmi=16398204) , based on a conversation with Forbes Contributor Freddie Dawson and Zimbra CMO Olivier Thierry.

It was indeed our pleasure of meeting with your team and the opportunity to discuss other service(s) offerings i.e. connectivity solution to your esteemed group.

Please find attached Back up Proposal, Colocation form and more information on benefits of MainOne data centre Solution offering as requested.

The conglomerate Industry has experienced a surge in demand for information technology solutions to drive business processes. The new era of Dana Group's operations will be marked by highly agile networked branches, subsidiaries and suppliers that use information analytics as they deploy and deliver products/services.

The need to effectively store, manage and access information on demand in order to create a differencing factor will be dependent on a reliable and proven enterprise Data Center facility backed by a highly reliable communication network. Consistent with global best practices where major businesses host their data offsite in certified data centers interconnected with reliable high speed communications networks, Main One has launched into the data center business by building a one-of-a-kind, Tier 3+ data center in Lagos and another within a 50-kilometer radius of Lagos.

Our 600-rack data center, touted as the largest in West Africa, designed to meet TIA 942 standards, will offer a highly secured and reliable purpose built facility. We also understand your Organisation's requirement for a highly secured environment. Our data centre is designed to meet these requirements and features in place to buttress this include, Perimeter and internal facility fitted with motion sensitive surveillance, 24 x 7 armed security guards, and biometric access controls. We can also provide for additional comfort and security a caged environment area as well as a dedicated suite for your collocated equipment.

Our proven track record of excellence in operating a Data center facility hosting primary and secondary data infrastructure for customers in the Financial Industry, Oil and Gas, Telecommunication government testifies to our reliability.  This makes our services attractive to Dana business needs and will enable you easily accomplish the following:

*             Reduce the current costs of building and maintaining your own data center;
*             Ensure the highest standards of availability of service based on Main One's proven no-compromise design and operations;
*             Provide a faster consolidated view of organization-wide information to support decision- making processes;
*             Benefit from the ongoing operational expertise of highly-trained Professionals, allowing you to focus on your core business; and
*             Access your network via Main One's highly reliable metro fiber network and global Internet reach.

We believe that incorporating outsourced data center services into your operational model for the future will be important to assure reduced cost, enhanced access to strategic IT services, and continued overall competitiveness of your organization.

We look forward to your feedback.

Special promotion: 50% discount training fee for Configuring and Troubleshooting a Windows Server? 2008 Network Infrastructure

The purpose of this 5-day course is to teach the WIS TS how to implement and configure secure network access as well as how to implement fault tolerant storage technologies with FSRM2 and DFS.

Course Duration: 5 Days

About This Course
This five-day instructor-led course provides students with the knowledge and skills to configure and troubleshoot a Windows Sever 2008 network infrastructure. Students will learn to implement and configure secure network access and implement fault tolerant storage technologies. Students will gain an understanding of the network technologies most commonly used with Windows Server 2008 and IP-enabled networks. Students will also learn how to secure servers and maintain update compliance.

Audience Profile
The primary audience for this course includes Active Directory technology specialists aspiring to be Enterprise Administrators (Tier 4 day-to-day network operations) or Network Administrators (Tier 2). Experienced Server Administrators aspiring to be Enterprise Administrators would also benefit from this course.

The secondary audience for this course includes Storage Area Network Administrators who need to understand this information to deploy or extend their current storage infrastructure. Operations Managers who need this information to support troubleshooting efforts and business decisions would also benefit from this course.

At Course Completion
After completing this course, students will be able to:
ú         Install and configure servers.
ú         Configure and troubleshoot DNS.
ú         Configure and manage WINS.
ú         Configure and troubleshoot DHCP.
ú         Configure and troubleshoot IPv6 TCP/IP.
ú         Configure and troubleshoot Routing and Remote Access.
ú         Install, configure, and troubleshoot the Network Policy Server Role service.

Dear Girish,

It was indeed our pleasure of meeting with your team and the opportunity to discuss other service(s) offerings i.e. connectivity solution to your esteemed group.

Please find attached Back up Proposal, Colocation form and more information on benefits of MainOne data centre Solution offering as requested.

The conglomerate Industry has experienced a surge in demand for information technology solutions to drive business processes. The new era of Dana Group's operations will be marked by highly agile networked branches, subsidiaries and suppliers that use information analytics as they deploy and deliver products/services.

The need to effectively store, manage and access information on demand in order to create a differencing factor will be dependent on a reliable and proven enterprise Data Center facility backed by a highly reliable communication network. Consistent with global best practices where major businesses host their data offsite in certified data centers interconnected with reliable high speed communications networks, Main One has launched into the data center business by building a one-of-a-kind, Tier 3+ data center in Lagos and another within a 50-kilometer radius of Lagos.

Our 600-rack data center, touted as the largest in West Africa, designed to meet TIA 942 standards, will offer a highly secured and reliable purpose built facility. We also understand your Organisation's requirement for a highly secured environment. Our data centre is designed to meet these requirements and features in place to buttress this include, Perimeter and internal facility fitted with motion sensitive surveillance, 24 x 7 armed security guards, and biometric access controls. We can also provide for additional comfort and security a caged environment area as well as a dedicated suite for your collocated equipment.

Our proven track record of excellence in operating a Data center facility hosting primary and secondary data infrastructure for customers in the Financial Industry, Oil and Gas, Telecommunication government testifies to our reliability.  This makes our services attractive to Dana business needs and will enable you easily accomplish the following:

*             Reduce the current costs of building and maintaining your own data center;
*             Ensure the highest standards of availability of service based on Main One's proven no-compromise design and operations;
*             Provide a faster consolidated view of organization-wide information to support decision- making processes;
*             Benefit from the ongoing operational expertise of highly-trained Professionals, allowing you to focus on your core business; and
*             Access your network via Main One's highly reliable metro fiber network and global Internet reach.

We believe that incorporating outsourced data center services into your operational model for the future will be important to assure reduced cost, enhanced access to strategic IT services, and continued overall competitiveness of your organization.

We look forward to your feedback.

Subject: BACK UP & CONNECTIVITY SOLUTION TO DANA GROUP

Dear Girish,

It was indeed our pleasure of meeting with your team and the opportunity to discuss other service(s) offerings i.e. connectivity solution to your esteemed group.

Please find attached Back up Proposal, Colocation form and more information on benefits of MainOne data centre Solution offering as requested.

The conglomerate Industry has experienced a surge in demand for information technology solutions to drive business processes. The new era of Dana Group's operations will be marked by highly agile networked branches, subsidiaries and suppliers that use information analytics as they deploy and deliver products/services.

The need to effectively store, manage and access information on demand in order to create a differencing factor will be dependent on a reliable and proven enterprise Data Center facility backed by a highly reliable communication network. Consistent with global best practices where major businesses host their data offsite in certified data centers interconnected with reliable high speed communications networks, Main One has launched into the data center business by building a one-of-a-kind, Tier 3+ data center in Lagos and another within a 50-kilometer radius of Lagos.

Our 600-rack data center, touted as the largest in West Africa, designed to meet TIA 942 standards, will offer a highly secured and reliable purpose built facility. We also understand your Organisation's requirement for a highly secured environment. Our data centre is designed to meet these requirements and features in place to buttress this include, Perimeter and internal facility fitted with motion sensitive surveillance, 24 x 7 armed security guards, and biometric access controls. We can also provide for additional comfort and security a caged environment area as well as a dedicated suite for your collocated equipment.

Our proven track record of excellence in operating a Data center facility hosting primary and secondary data infrastructure for customers in the Financial Industry, Oil and Gas, Telecommunication government testifies to our reliability.  This makes our services attractive to Dana business needs and will enable you easily accomplish the following:

*             Reduce the current costs of building and maintaining your own data center;
*             Ensure the highest standards of availability of service based on Main One's proven no-compromise design and operations;
*             Provide a faster consolidated view of organization-wide information to support decision- making processes;
*             Benefit from the ongoing operational expertise of highly-trained Professionals, allowing you to focus on your core business; and
*             Access your network via Main One's highly reliable metro fiber network and global Internet reach.

We believe that incorporating outsourced data center services into your operational model for the future will be important to assure reduced cost, enhanced access to strategic IT services, and continued overall competitiveness of your organization.

We look forward to your feedback.

Warm Regard

George Opara

Subject: BACK UP & CONNECTIVITY SOLUTION TO DANA GROUP

Dear Girish,

It was indeed our pleasure of meeting with your team and the opportunity to discuss other service(s) offerings i.e. connectivity solution to your esteemed group.

Please find attached Back up Proposal, Colocation form and more information on benefits of MainOne data centre Solution offering as requested.

The conglomerate Industry has experienced a surge in demand for information technology solutions to drive business processes. The new era of Dana Group?s operations will be marked by highly agile networked branches, subsidiaries and suppliers that use information analytics as they deploy and deliver products/services.

The need to effectively store, manage and access information on demand in order to create a differencing factor will be dependent on a reliable and proven enterprise Data Center facility backed by a highly reliable communication network. Consistent with global best practices where major businesses host their data offsite in certified data centers interconnected with reliable high speed communications networks, Main One has launched into the data center business by building a one-of-a-kind, Tier 3+ data center in Lagos and another within a 50-kilometer radius of Lagos.

Our 600-rack data center, touted as the largest in West Africa, designed to meet TIA 942 standards, will offer a highly secured and reliable purpose built facility. We also understand your Organisation?s requirement for a highly secured environment. Our data centre is designed to meet these requirements and features in place to buttress this include, Perimeter and internal facility fitted with motion sensitive surveillance, 24 x 7 armed security guards, and biometric access controls. We can also provide for additional comfort and security a caged environment area as well as a dedicated suite for your collocated equipment.

Our proven track record of excellence in operating a Data center facility hosting primary and secondary data infrastructure for customers in the Financial Industry, Oil and Gas, Telecommunication government testifies to our reliability.  This makes our services attractive to Dana business needs and will enable you easily accomplish the following:

?             Reduce the current costs of building and maintaining your own data center;
?             Ensure the highest standards of availability of service based on Main One?s proven no-compromise design and operations;
?             Provide a faster consolidated view of organization-wide information to support decision- making processes;
?             Benefit from the ongoing operational expertise of highly-trained Professionals, allowing you to focus on your core business; and
?             Access your network via Main One?s highly reliable metro fiber network and global Internet reach.

We believe that incorporating outsourced data center services into your operational model for the future will be important to assure reduced cost, enhanced access to strategic IT services, and continued overall competitiveness of your organization.

We look forward to your feedback.

Warm Regard

Body: Zimbra-Nurture-Program-Email-Header-Wk4.jpg (http://www.zimbra.com/?utm_campaign=zimbra-free-trial&utm_source=hs_automation&utm_medium=email&utm_content=10868684&_hsenc=p2ANqtz-_X0UXEHs0r3K2BnHwyZ4qrKjU0lTNyjdp5m-Rq51_SuEuVHfciXv8aSskfWObxlICwvkgg4wHNQG9822Kw5jhZ2KonDA&_hsmi=10868684)      

Greetings Cosmas,

Wow, time is flying by ... you are almost halfway through your 60-day trial. If you?ve hit a roadblock or have questions, we are here to help; feel free to email sales@zimbra.com (mailto:sales@zimbra.com) for questions regarding your trial.

By now, you?ve done many of the basics and it?s time to tackle advanced integration and administration tasks. This is also the last checklist we?ve created to help you make the most of your evaluation.

Week 4 Evaluation Checklist: 

- SSO Integration (http://www.zimbra.com/docs/ne/8.0.0/administration_guide/wwhelp/wwhimpl/js/html/wwhelp.htm?utm_campaign=zimbra-free-trial&utm_source=hs_automation&utm_medium=email&utm_content=10868684&_hsenc=p2ANqtz-9je5uEpEoYUaeSCPaLLIIKaWMibNzAJM5-Spc96fSGVW4U7rpuak6A1tOd3mOS1BWtwGH001BRCYVmPqHM4_3NMZKncQ&_hsmi=10868684#href=NE_admin_guide_8.Appendix_B_Configuring_SPNEGO_Single_Sign-On.html) : Setting up Single Sign-On

- Delegated Administration (http://www.zimbra.com/docs/ne/8.0.0/administration_guide/wwhelp/wwhimpl/js/html/wwhelp.htm?utm_campaign=zimbra-free-trial&utm_source=hs_automation&utm_medium=email&utm_content=10868684&_hsenc=p2ANqtz-9rZF5FoNkBgnSvLQ86Hiq6OjF9wdBcGyHHwovUlzuAG31F5s8PGkjPH2qaw_nVFiosxbW0iSr85TUAM6APKKJfF3UuOw&_hsmi=10868684#href=NE_admin_guide_8.Delegated_Administration.html) : For more efficient management of delegated administrators, create administrator groups and add individual administrator accounts to the group. An administrator group allows you to create role-based access control.

- Hierarchical Storage Management (HSM) (http://www.zimbra.com/docs/ne/8.0.0/administration_guide/wwhelp/wwhimpl/js/html/wwhelp.htm?utm_campaign=zimbra-free-trial&utm_source=hs_automation&utm_medium=email&utm_content=10868684&_hsenc=p2ANqtz-_ChU_yFko3FxDNOn3w5opIiNY265UVx2lb0KLTQvvmQ5G_5OWDrUHr5ukJckbs9s8tb-tsSMxltN-lbzpUbrvBbxKfcw&_hsmi=10868684#href=NE_admin_guide_8.Implementing_Hierarchical_Storage_Management.html) : To manage your disk utilization, implement a global HSM policy or a HSM policy for each mailbox server. The policy configured on individual servers overrides the global policy.

- Standard Zimlet Integration (http://wiki.zimbra.com/wiki/Working_with_Zimlets?utm_campaign=zimbra-free-trial&utm_source=hs_automation&utm_medium=email&utm_content=10868684&_hsenc=p2ANqtz-8B2YTJixNVWaXRppU92by02NvTWRxBR18Kmovpq9tPjSlUDwkJG1L21C1OPSv1MQSIIQ8_1kRY8erV_tLtIk4LSkW_Nw&_hsmi=10868684) : Several predefined Zimlets are included with your install. You can create other Zimlets that interact with your company resources or other defined applications through the Zimbra Web Client.

- Archiving and Discovery: (http://www.zimbra.com/products/email-archiving.html?utm_campaign=zimbra-free-trial&utm_source=hs_automation&utm_medium=email&utm_content=10868684&_hsenc=p2ANqtz-8HSraHt19M_VTpaWr2ngUuGM0HJ7IwG7oOE2qN3pl8O9Y-vI0BCuAV84rahMJntGeB3JnbiUhE4MZMwwLntkXQUev74w&_hsmi=10868684)  The Zimbra Archiving and Discovery (ZAD) module is bundled with the ZCS download and can be installed in the Zimbra Administration Console via the Command Line Interface (CLI).

Thanks again, and have a great day!

The Zimbra Team

Subject: Welcome to the K9 Community!
Body: Welcome to the K9 Community!

Thank you for choosing K9 Web Protection! At Blue Coat, we believe that homes connected to the internet should be safe.  Whether you are protecting children from adult content, assisting yourself in avoiding threats and temptations, or keeping your computer clean from spyware and malware, we hope that K9 will serve you well.  For these reasons, we make K9 Web Protection free to all home users.

We also need concerned and involved people like you to help us spread the word about these issues and the tools available to help others. Below are some suggestions on effective community actions.

1.  INSTALL K9 WEB PROTECTION

Do the following to install K9 Web Protection:

  a) Download K9 Web Protection from http://www1.k9webprotection.com/getk9/download-software .
  b) During the installation, you will be asked for your license.  Your K9 Web Protection license is: 

K96Y58BZAZ

  c) You will also be asked for an administrator password.  Please choose one that you will not forget.  K9 Web Protection is a security product, and by design, it's hard to get around, so please REMEMBER YOUR PASSWORD!  You will need this password to adjust K9's settings or to uninstall the product.
  d) Certain firewall settings can hamper or disable functionality of K9 Web Protection.  Make sure to instruct your firewall to always allow k9filter.exe access to the Internet.

2.  PROTECT YOUR iPhone(R), iPod touch(R), iPad(TM) OR Android(TM) device

The K9 Web Protection Browser is a safe web browser available from the App Store(SM) or Google Play. Just search for "K9".

Just like K9 Web Protection for your desktop, the app is also free!

Subject: SECURITY ALERT DURING ELECTION
Body:              

 HEALTH, SAFETY, SECURITY & ENVIRONMENT 

 

 


Election Weekends 28th March 2015 & 11th April 2015 

With the rescheduled dates for the forthcoming Presidential election on the 28th March and later the Governorships and State Assembly elections on the 11th April fast approaching, the political parties are again undertaking multiple rallies across Nigeria and Lagos in particular has high political campaigning activity. 

As previously reported, these gatherings often result in incidents of violence and public disorder with groups of rival political supporters clashing; additionally, criminal groups (area boys and street gangs) exploit the situation to steal and commit robberies. It is a reality that these rallies are highly emotive events and there is expected to be further public disorder, violence and criminal activity; therefore you are advised to avoid such gatherings and events. The following advice is recommended to all staff for the weekends of the respective elections themselves: 

 

? Other than visiting a polling station to vote ?early? in the morning, individuals and their families should stay indoors and avoid any gatherings. 

 

? If living near a polling station or political party office then consider spending the weekend with family or friends elsewhere. 

 

? Ensure you have sufficient food, water and cooking/heating fuel in your home for up to 96 hours. 

 

? If you own a private vehicle, if possible, avoid leaving it parked on the public road or street. 

 

? If faced with an emergency and absolutely necessary to travel by car then use previous guidance relating to you own personal Journey Management (plan your journey/route and have alternatives; ensure the vehicle is roadworthy; tell someone of your travel plans, departure time and expected arrival time; avoid routine; keep valuables out of site; keep doors locked and windows closed (if no air conditioning then maximum 2? opening but never when stationary); avoid travelling after dark; avoid travelling alone; always have your mobile phone fully charged; Be vigilant, if you have concerns, do not stop and go to a well-lit public or safe area). 

 

? Check with your supervisor and/or manager regarding any special arrangements concerning work start times, finish times and/or closures during the election periods. 

 

? If you become aware of a situation or disturbance then avoid that area and report the matter to your site CSO/HSSE Officer to enable details to be shared with other staff. 

 

KNOWN CRIME HOTSPOTS TO BE AVOIDED 

There has been a reported increase in the robbery of bus passengers (also known as ?One Chance? robberies) across Lagos; these robbers strike mostly between 4.30am & 6.30am and then again between 8.00pm and 10.00pm, most victims being commuters going to and from work. 

The following areas have been identified as current ?hotspots? for this type of crime: 

I yana-Iba Bus Stop, Lagos Badagry Expressway;  Anthony Bus Stop, Lagos Ikorodu Expressway; Fadeyi Bus Stop, Mushin; Ojuelegba Bus Stop, Surulere; Costain Slip Road, Eko Bridge; Jibowu Bus Stop, Murtala Muhammed Way and Ketu Bus Stop, Ikorodu Road. 

 

All staff are advised to exercise increased vigilance and situational awareness: 

1.     Avoid using your mobile phones at the bus stop. 2.

2.         Ensure your phones, iPads and tablets are not unnecessarily displayed in public. 3. 

3.        Avoid carrying large bags when going out very early or when you are likely to return very late. Women are often more vulnerable. 

4.         Always look inside before boarding a bus and take note of other passengers; if unsure don?t enter. 

5.        Avoid standing alone in the dark or far from the main bus stop. 

    6. Follow advice previously given regarding personal journey management and safety. 

7. Car owners should lock attractive and expensive items in the boot/trunk of their cars. 

8. Do not pick up friends or family where there is a crowd; stop a few meters away to do this. 

9. Always share security information with family members, friends and colleagues. 

 

 

Best regards,

 

Nneka Ukoh

(Secretary)

Subject: ElegantJ BI releases MDX Connectors for Microsoft SSAS and other MDX providers
Body: Dear Cosmas Ogbobe,

ElegantJ BI recently launched its MDX connector, designed to support
data access and integration with third party MDX XML/A providers like
Microsoft SQL Server Analysis services (MS SSAS), SAP BW, Palo and
Pentaho. The proprietary MOLAP-based cube engine provides high
performance analytics supported by unique Managed Memory Computing,
and now with this MDX connector launch, users have the option of
connecting with other BI platforms to take full advantage their
investments in these BI tools and products from other vendors.

The ElegantJ BI front-end objects like dashboards, reports, KPI, OLAP
analysis and interactive graphs can access MS SSAS Tabular in-memory
cache mode, and Multidimensional Model with all three basic storage
modes: Multidimensional OLAP (MOLAP), Relational OLAP (ROLAP) and
Hybrid OLAP (HOLAP).

The new MDX connector ensures that every organization can leverage
previous technology investments and achieve unbeatable TCO and ROI
with rapid development and deployment of dashboards, key performance
indicators (KPI), ad-hoc reports, OLAP analysis and interactive
graphs.

ElegantJ BI also offers easy integration through RESTful web services
and JavaScript, so every organizations can embed BI dashboards and
reports with their applications. The best news is that the average
implementation time for ElegantJ BI is 4 to 6 weeks. Deployment
requires only general IT skills, so an enterprise does not have to
employ specialized IT resources or consultants.
